message:
feat(web): add multipart/form-data parsing extractor (RFC 7578)

Implement a synchronous multipart/form-data body parser as a
FromRequest extractor. The Multipart type exposes parsed
MultipartField values with name, optional filename, content type,
headers, and raw body bytes.

Key design decisions:
- 16 MiB maximum body size, 1024 maximum parts, 8 KiB max headers
  per part to bound resource consumption
- Supports both CRLF and bare-LF line endings for client compatibility
- Handles quoted and unquoted boundary/disposition parameters
- Content-Disposition escaped quote handling for filenames

Includes 23 unit tests covering boundary extraction, disposition
parameter parsing, full body parsing (single field, multi-field,
file upload, binary, empty), FromRequest integration (success,
wrong content type, missing content type, missing boundary, payload
too large), accessor methods, and edge cases (LF endings, preamble
before first boundary).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
